channel.title: MD not rendering properly in my PR that was mereged
channel.description:
Hello all!
I recently had a PR merged [https://github.com/frontity/step-by-step-tutorial/pull/36](https://github.com/frontity/step-by-step-tutorial/pull/36) and I had a few questions.
1. The markdown is not rendering properly and I am not sure why? There is a picture in the PR for reference. 2. Is there a way to run the step by step repo locally? It would be helpful for contributing.
Thank you!

item.title: MD not rendering properly in my PR that was mereged
item.dc:creator: alexmaldonado
item.description:
Anyone out there?

Read full topic
item.source: MD not rendering properly in my PR that was mereged

item.title: MD not rendering properly in my PR that was mereged
item.dc:creator: alexmaldonado
item.description:
Hello all!

I recently had a PR merged https://github.com/frontity/step-by-step-tutorial/pull/36 and I had a few questions.

  1. The markdown is not rendering properly and I am not sure why? There is a picture in the PR for reference.
  2. Is there a way to run the step by step repo locally? It would be helpful for contributing.

Thank you!

Read full topic
item.source: MD not rendering properly in my PR that was mereged
